Section Title: ... > ### About HSBC Global Emerging Markets Direct Plan Growth
Content:
HSBC Global Emerging Markets Direct Plan Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HSBC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 27 May 2002. Sonal Gupta is the Current Fund Manager of HSBC Global Emerging Markets Direct Plan Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹1,37,332 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 02 Apr 2026 is ₹30.87.
The HSBC Global Emerging Markets Direct Plan Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹1,000. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
;
Section Title: HSBC Global Emerging Markets Direct Plan Growth > ... > Investment Objective
Content:
The scheme will provide long term capital appreciation by investing predominantly in units of HSBC Global Investment Funds- Global Emerging Markets Equity Fund.
Fund benchmark MSCI Emerging Markets Total Return Index
[Scheme Information Document(SID)](https://www.assetmanagement.hsbc.co.in)

results.title: HSBC Global Investment Summit 2026 | HSBC Private Bank
excerpts:
Section Title: HSBC Global Investment Summit > HSBC Global Investment Summit 2026: The Wealth Sessions
Content:
This year, you’ll hear from **Dr Janet Yellen** , former Chair of the US Federal Reserve, who will share her views on the global economic outlook, the evolving role of the US dollar, and Asia’s growing influence as a driver of international growth. The sessions will also feature focused panels exploring emerging investment opportunities, the transformative impact of AI and technology, and key trends shaping China’s economy. Gain timely intelligence and valuable insights to help you make confident, informed decisions in today’s dynamic market.
This event is by invitation only. Please reach out to your HSBC Relationship Manager to get access or submit your request from the Contact us form.
 ... 
Section Title: HSBC Global Investment Summit > ... > Risk warning > Important notice
Content:
Collapse Expand
This is a marketing communication issued by **HSBC Private Bank** . HSBC Private Bank is the principal private bank business of the HSBC Group. Private Bank may be carried out internationally by different HSBC legal entities according to local regulatory requirements. Different companies within HSBC Private Bank or the HSBC Group may provide the services listed in this document. Members of the HSBC Group may trade in products mentioned in this publication.
 ... 
Section Title: HSBC Global Investment Summit > ... > Risk warning > Important notice
Content:
Investments in emerging markets are by their nature higher risk and potentially more volatile than those inherent in some established markets. Economies in emerging markets generally are heavily dependent upon international trade and, accordingly, have been and may continue to be affected adversely by trade barriers, exchange controls, managed adjustments in relative currency values and other protectionist measures imposed or negotiated by the countries with which they trade. These economies also have been and may continue to be affected adversely by economic conditions in the countries in which they trade. Investments are subject to market risks, read all investment related documents carefully.
 ... 
Section Title: HSBC Global Investment Summit > ... > Risk warning > Important notice
Content:
**In HSBC India,** this material is distributed by Hongkong and Shanghai Bank Corporation Limited, India (“HSBC India”). HSBC India is a branch of the Hongkong and Shanghai Bank Corporation Limited. HSBC India is an AMFI-registered Mutual Fund Distributor of select mutual funds and a referrer of other 3rd party investment products. Mutual Fund investments are subject to market risks, read all scheme related documents carefully. HSBC India does not distribute investment products to those persons who are either the citizens or residents of United States of America (USA), Canada or any other jurisdiction where such distribution would be contrary to law or regulation. HSBC India, will receive commission from HSBC Asset Management (India) Private Limited, in its capacity as a AMFI registered mutual fund distributor of HSBC Mutual Fund.
Section Title: HSBC Global Investment Summit > ... > Risk warning > Important notice
Content:
The Sponsor of HSBC Mutual Fund is HSBC Securities and Capital Markets (India) Private Limited (HSCI), a member of the HSBC Group. Please note that HSBC India and the Sponsor being part of the HSBC Group, may give rise to real, perceived, or potential conflicts of interest. HSBC India has a policy in place to identify, prevent and manage such conflict of interest. HSBC India provides non-discretionary portfolio advisory services for select Private Bank customers under the SEBI (Portfolio Managers) Regulations, 2020 (“PMS Regulations”) vide registration no. INP000000795. Performance of each portfolio may vary for each investor because of 1) the timing of inflows and outflows of funds; and 2) differences in the portfolio composition because of restrictions and other constraints.
